历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 7446 → 10403 → 10153 → 10322 → 10262. The ranking was highest in 2021 (7446), stabilized between 10153 and 10403 from 2022 onward, with a baseline of about 10262 in 2025. The fluctuation range over the past 4 years is about 250 places, showing an overall stable trend. From 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 182 → 203 → 173 → 174 → 195, with 195 planned for 2025. The 2026 plan is 155, a significant reduction of 40 students (-20.5%) compared to 2025, which theoretically reduces competition and lowers the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 16th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (15th in 2025), firmly in the national Top 20, with strong comprehensive strength. The 2026 reputation evaluation is clearly negative, involving multiple incidents of teacher ethics, academic misconduct, etc. (51 negative incidents), which may affect some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranking is 35th (relatively hot), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 19 disciplines were rated A- or above, including Stomatology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Nursing A+, Clinical Medicine A, Mathematics A, Chemistry A, Biology A, Pharmacy A, Software Engineering A, etc., with outstanding strength in medicine and humanities disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are highly recommended due to social popularity. Clinical Medicine and Stomatology remain consistently hot. Journalism and Communication are clearly discouraged (Zhang Xuefeng effect). The number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province increased from 166,000 in 2021 to 261,000 in 2025, with continuous growth. In 2026, the total number of candidates is 521,000, with an estimated 379,000 in Physics Category based on historical proportions, an increase of about 118,000 (+45%) compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition. Sichuan University is located in Chengdu (western region). Jiangsu candidates applying to a western 985 university need to consider regional preferences. The university's enrollment proportion in Jiangsu is about 18.8% (2025), making it a major out-of-province enrollment province, with a neutral to weak impact of regional preference on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the significant reduction in Physics Category enrollment in 2026 (-20.5%) lowering the ranking number, the substantial increase in Physics Category candidates in Jiangsu Province (+45%) intensifying competition, the clearly negative university reputation potentially suppressing application enthusiasm, and the high university level (985/Top20) maintaining core attractiveness, the reduction and candidate growth offset each other, but competition still slightly intensifies. With limited corrections based on the surge in candidate numbers and negative reputation, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 9199, with a range of 8699–9699.

prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 四川大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选双一流建设高校，位于四川省成都市。学校综合实力雄厚，医学学科是其传统优势领域，华西 医学中心在全国享有极高声誉，对江苏考生具有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在江苏省持续保持较高报考热度，临床医学、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。四川大学医学类专业在江苏招生规模适中，2026年计划41人，涵盖临床医学、口腔医学 、药学、预防医学、护理学等多个方向。护理学专业录取门槛相对较低，拉低了医学类整体最低位次，但核心医学专业位次仍维持在较高水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合供需弹性模型及历年趋势，预测2026年四川大学医学类最低录取位次约为35100名，较2025年略有下降（位次数字减小，录取难度略降），主要受缩招及护理学持续招生影响 。建议位次在34600~35600区间的考生积极报考，位次更靠前的考生可冲刺核心医学专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum admission rankings for Sichuan University's medical category in Jiangsu Province from 2021 to 2025 were 6791, 9960, 10153, 8379, and 37720 respectively, showing a fluctuating pattern of first decreasing, then increasing, and then sharply dropping. From 2021 to 2024, rankings were relatively stable within the range of 6791 to 10153, but in 2025, due to the inclusion of the nursing major (minimum ranking 37720) into the medical category statistics, the overall minimum ranking dropped significantly to 37720. In terms of enrollment plans, there were 32 students in 2021, 31 in 2022, 28 in 2023, 35 in 2024, and 46 in 2025, showing an expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 41 students, a decrease of 5 students from 2025, a reduction of about 10.87%. According to the supply-demand elasticity model, the reduction will further decrease the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Sichuan University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a Double First-Class construction university, located in Chengdu, Sichuan Province. The university has strong comprehensive strength, with medical disciplines being its traditional advantage area. The West China Medical Center enjoys a very high reputation nationwide and has strong appeal to Jiangsu candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity in Jiangsu Province, with core majors such as clinical medicine and stomatology being highly competitive. Sichuan University's medical majors have a moderate enrollment scale in Jiangsu, with a 2026 plan of 41 students, covering multiple directions including clinical medicine, stomatology, pharmacy, preventive medicine, and nursing. The nursing major has a relatively low admission threshold, lowering the overall minimum ranking of the medical category, but the rankings of core medical majors remain at a high level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the supply-demand elasticity model and historical trends, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for Sichuan University's medical category in 2026 will be approximately 35100, slightly lower than in 2025 (ranking number decreases, admission difficulty slightly decreases), mainly affected by the enrollment reduction and the continued enrollment of nursing. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the range of 34600 to 35600 actively apply, while candidates with higher rankings can aim for core medical majors.
